name: Antigen Retrieval Buffer (EDTA, pH 9.0)

notes.en: Adjust pH to 9.0 with NaOH. For nuclear antigens (Ki67, H3K4me3), membrane antigens (HER2), or when citrate pH 6.0 fails. Heat 95–100°C 20 min (pressure cooker or water bath). Cool 20 min at RT before use.
notes.zh: NaOH 调 pH 至 9.0。适用于核抗原（Ki67、H3K4me3）、膜抗原（HER2）及柠檬酸缓冲液效果差的情况。95–100°C 加热 20 min。冷却 20 min 后继续操作。

ref: Shi et al. (2001) J Histochem Cytochem 49:931–937; Ramos-Vara & Miller (2014) Vet Pathol 51:42–87

usage.en: EDTA antigen retrieval buffer (pH 9.0) for nuclear antigens in IHC (Ki67, H3K4me3).
usage.zh: EDTA 抗原修复缓冲液（pH 9.0），用于 IHC 中核抗原（Ki67、H3K4me3）的修复。

prepSteps.step: Adjust pH to 9.0 with NaOH (EDTA dissolves as pH rises).
Bring to final volume of 1000 mL with ddH₂O.
